caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a plain black background. She is wearing a light green, embroidered top and a dark necklace. A small black clip-on microphone is attached to the center of her neckline. In the bottom left corner of the scene, a logo consisting of a stylized circular emblem and the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, she remains centered in the frame, gesturing with her hands as she speaks. Her facial expressions shift as she talks, moving from a focused expression to blinking her eyes and then returning to speaking. Her hands move slightly upward and together in a gesturing motion toward the end of the clip, while her overall posture remains steady.
